title: Everything Slime
description: This mod makes every block in Minecraft bouncy, like slime.
body:
# Everything Slime

Self-explanatory. It turns all blocks in your world bouncy! No more fall damage, just *BOUNCE!*

(Does not slow you down your walking like slime does. That would be no fun)

# More Fun

If you want to have more fun with your world, why not try out my new mod [Everything Ice](https://modrinth.com/mod/everything-ice) that makes all blocks infinitely slippery? 

# Other Versions:

Open the jar like a zip file with something like 7-zip or WinRAR. Edit the fabric.mod.json file inside to allow for whatever minecraft version you need. It should work on all anyway, but I can't be bothered to test every single one.
